violations.text: Menu does not contain an allergen statement. English Food Allergies What You Need to Know New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

Pasta salad, chicken salads, chicken parmesan, chicken salads, etc. are lacking complete labels. Unlabeled desserts lacking labels were placed behind the counter. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Packaged items sold in the establishment must have complete labels. English Food Labeling for Packaged Food New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice bin) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

Packaged food items sold in the establishment are lacking complete labels, the net contents and Keep Refrigerated storage instructions. Items were labeled during inspection with marker. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
